description: What format agent definitions use. Varies widely: Markdown with YAML frontmatter, JSON config files, TOML sections, or AGENTS.md plain markdown.

claude-code.mechanism: Markdown files with YAML frontmatter in .claude/agents/ (project) or ~/.claude/agents/ (user); file body becomes system prompt

codex.mechanism: TOML role config files referenced from config.toml [agents] section; built-in roles (default/explorer/worker) always available without user config

copilot-cli.mechanism: .agent.md files with YAML frontmatter (description required); up to 30,000 chars of Markdown instructions as agent system prompt

kiro.mechanism: JSON config files in .kiro/agents/ (project) or ~/.kiro/agents/ (global); prompt field accepts inline string or file:// URI to external .md file

windsurf.mechanism: AGENTS.md (or agents.md) plain markdown files with no frontmatter; scope inferred from directory location (root = always-on, subdirectory = auto-glob subtree)
